name: Patient Case
history: Ongoing interpersonal difficulties involving a partner named Ivan and his family. Recent trust and betrayal issues involving Ivan. Ongoing contact with Ivan's family.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
intermediate_belief: People I care about will betray me.
intermediate_belief_depression: I cannot trust anyone close to me.
coping_strategies: Avoid confrontation and suppress feelings to maintain peace.
situation: Discovered that Ivan made travel plans without consulting the patient.
auto_thought: Ivan doesn't care about my feelings or opinions.
behavior: Withdrawing from Ivan and his family, avoiding discussions about the travel plans.
